# KomoUI

> KomoUI (Kotlin Modern UI) is a Kotlin Multiplatform UI library for Jetpack
> Compose, inspired by shadcn/ui. Beautifully designed components you copy and
> paste into your apps, targeting Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web.

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://komoui.site/docs/introduction): What KomoUI is and how the copy-paste model works
- [Installation](https://komoui.site/docs/installation): Add KomoUI to a Kotlin Multiplatform / Compose project
- [Theming](https://komoui.site/docs/theming): Colors, typography, and dark mode
- [Tailwind to Kotlin](https://komoui.site/docs/tailwind-to-kotlin): Convert Tailwind CSS classes to Compose modifiers

## Components

- [Accordion](https://komoui.site/docs/components/accordion): Vertically stacked, expandable sections
- [Alert](https://komoui.site/docs/components/alert): Callout for important messages
- [Alert Dialog](https://komoui.site/docs/components/alert-dialog): Modal dialog for confirming a destructive action
- [Avatar](https://komoui.site/docs/components/avatar): User image with fallback initials
- [Badge](https://komoui.site/docs/components/badge): Small status or label indicator
- [Button](https://komoui.site/docs/components/button): Clickable button with variants and sizes
- [Calendar](https://komoui.site/docs/components/calendar): Date grid for selecting days
- [Card](https://komoui.site/docs/components/card): Container with header, content, and footer
- [Carousel](https://komoui.site/docs/components/carousel): Swipeable set of slides
- [Chart](https://komoui.site/docs/components/chart): Data visualization components
- [Checkbox](https://komoui.site/docs/components/checkbox): Toggleable checkbox input
- [Collapsible](https://komoui.site/docs/components/collapsible): Show/hide a section of content
- [Combobox](https://komoui.site/docs/components/combobox): Searchable select input
- [Data Table](https://komoui.site/docs/components/data-table): Sortable, filterable tabular data
- [Date Picker](https://komoui.site/docs/components/date-picker): Input paired with a calendar for picking dates
- [Dialog](https://komoui.site/docs/components/dialog): Modal overlay window
- [Drawer (Bottom Sheet)](https://komoui.site/docs/components/drawer): Panel that slides in from an edge
- [Dropdown Menu](https://komoui.site/docs/components/dropdown-menu): Menu triggered by a button
- [Input](https://komoui.site/docs/components/input): Text input field
- [Input OTP](https://komoui.site/docs/components/input-otp): One-time-password / code entry field
- [Popover](https://komoui.site/docs/components/popover): Floating content anchored to a trigger
- [Progress](https://komoui.site/docs/components/progress): Progress bar indicator
- [Radio Group](https://komoui.site/docs/components/radio-group): Mutually exclusive set of options
- [Select](https://komoui.site/docs/components/select): Dropdown selection input
- [Sidebar](https://komoui.site/docs/components/sidebar): Collapsible navigation sidebar
- [Skeleton](https://komoui.site/docs/components/skeleton): Loading placeholder
- [Slider](https://komoui.site/docs/components/slider): Draggable value selector
- [Sonner](https://komoui.site/docs/components/sonner): Toast notifications
- [Spinner](https://komoui.site/docs/components/spinner): Loading spinner indicator
- [Switch](https://komoui.site/docs/components/switch): On/off toggle
- [Tabs](https://komoui.site/docs/components/tabs): Switch between panels of content
